query: Find 10 parcels in Trondheim municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, sorted by parcel area descending, and report both municipality and county.

1.description: resolve Trondheim municipality and county names and geometry

2.description: inspect quick-clay risk classes to identify high risk class

3.description: get high-risk quick-clay hazard areas within Trondheim municipality extent

4.description: get parcels in Trondheim larger than 5000 m²

5.description: find parcels intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: one row per parcel with maximum area

9.description: select final output columns including municipality and county

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT ST_AsText(geom) AS geom, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, fylkesnavn FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';
